action.reasoning: Observation: LightGBM baseline gets IC=0.0485 with early stopping on MAE at iteration 198. IC was still improving when MAE plateaued. Analysis: 1) MAE early stopping doesn't optimize IC directly - need IC-based iteration selection. 2) Ensemble of diverse models (LightGBM + CatBoost) should improve robustness. 3) Better hyperparameters (more leaves, different regularization) may help. Decision: Train 2 LightGBM configs + CatBoost, find best IC iteration for each, try multiple ensemble strategies, save best configuration.
